sentence: His _______ of secretarial duties was timely.
Their _______ of his guilt disqualified them from jury duty.
definition: The act of assuming, or taking to or upon oneself; the act of taking up or adopting.
The act of taking for granted, or supposing a thing without proof; a supposition; an unwarrantable claim.
The thing supposed; a postulate, or proposition assumed; a supposition.
